title: hieracium mutinense
intro: Hieracium mutinense, also known as the Salsify Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Hieracium mutinense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
